name: PAR Golf Club
address: 39580 W 14 Mile Rd, Commerce Township, MI 48390
about: PAR Golf Club is a private, unmanned golf simulator facility located in Commerce Township, MI. It offers 24/7 access to members via secure keypad entry and Trackman-powered simulator bays. The venue is designed for serious golfers who prioritize technology, convenience, and exclusive access, with a focus on performance through premium Trackman technology and a private club atmosphere.
why_golfers_like_it: 24/7 access with complete freedom to practice or play at any time
Tour-level accuracy with Trackman IO technology for data-driven improvement
Exclusive member rates and priority booking for a seamless experience

food_and_drink.notes: Members may bring their own food and non-alcoholic drinks. Complimentary refreshments are available in the fridge for members. Food must be kept in the lounge area only.

simulator_hardware.notes: Private sim delivering tour-level accuracy, immersive visuals, and true-to-life golf experience

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify, but it is a standard practice for golf simulators that players bring their own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, members are welcome to bring their own food and non-alcoholic drinks into the bays. Complimentary refreshments are available in the fridge. Food must be kept in the lounge area only.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify a time estimate for playing 18 holes.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: No, all members must be 21 years of age or older, making the venue strictly for adults.
